news: Daiichi Sankyo delayed annual earnings release to review oncology supply plans and assess potential manufacturing contract loss provisions, causing shares to fall 10% to 4-year lows.

changes.reason: Supply chain concerns and manufacturing issues suggest operational execution risk that warrants lower valuation multiple
Manufacturing and supply issues amplify downside risk in bear scenario
Supply chain uncertainty reduces premium multiple in bull case

news: BGE-102 achieved ≥85% median hsCRP reductions in Phase 1, with Phase 2 cardiovascular and DME trials planned to initiate mid-2026.

changes.reason: ≥85% hsCRP reduction exceeds expectations and benchmarks like CANTOS/ziltivekimab
Strong Phase 1 efficacy signal de-risks Phase 2a approval probability
Even in bear case, ≥85% hsCRP reduction is clinically meaningful
Best-in-class hsCRP reduction supports higher bull case probability

news: Eli Lilly's weight loss drugs Foundayo and Zepbound are significantly underperforming Novo Nordisk's Wegovy in weekly prescriptions, with Foundayo getting only 3,707 vs Wegovy's 18,410 initial prescriptions and Zepbound declining 2% while Wegovy grew 7%.

changes.reason: Foundayo (Orforglipron) severely underperforming with only 3,707 initial prescriptions vs Wegovy's 18,410 suggests weaker market penetration potential
Poor early prescription data increases downside risk for oral GLP-1 penetration in bear case
Even in bull case, weak launch data reduces upside penetration potential for oral formulation
